expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: defect feedback loop injects scenarios from prior defects into next feature QA plan
expectations.evidence: The output does not demonstrate or produce a QA plan with scenarios injected from prior defects. It instead states the requirement cannot be satisfied: result.md: "The benchmark focus requires demonstrating that a defect feedback loop injects scenarios from prior defects into the next feature QA plan... However... we cannot... validate that 'defect feedback loop scenario injection' is implemented" and execution_notes.md: "Benchmark focus requires demonstrating defect feedback loop injects scenarios... but... there is no contract or artifact... showing an injection step exists."

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase8
expectations.evidence: The output explicitly says phase8 alignment cannot be shown because the snapshot defines only phases 0–7. result.md: "Verdict (phase_contract • advisory • phase8) Not satisfied / blocked by missing phase8 contract evidence." and "Alignment to phase8: Cannot be demonstrated... phases 0–7 only." execution_notes.md: "Primary phase under test is phase8, but snapshot evidence defines only phases 0–7."
